prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone selfie photo of a young woman in an indoor hallway or bedroom corner. The camera is held high above her face with her arm extended toward the lower right foreground, creating a wide-angle selfie perspective and slight foreshortening of the arm. She looks directly into the lens with a soft closed-mouth smile and relaxed, confident expression. She has dark brown messy hair gathered into a loose high bun with wispy strands around her face, natural eyebrows, light hazel-green eyes, warm medium skin, and minimal natural makeup with a subtle rosy glow. She wears a fitted black camisole crop top with lace trim along the neckline and straps, a tiny bow at the center, a delicate gold necklace with a small pendant, a dark bracelet, and a high-waisted gray-brown plaid pleated skirt. The composition crops from the top of the hair to mid-thigh, with shoulders and collarbones visible. Background: plain light gray wall on the left, dark wooden open door on the right with a round metal knob, tiled gray floor, and a few hanging bags partially visible near the doorway. Lighting is dim natural indoor light with soft shadows, slightly underexposed phone-camera look, realistic skin texture, casual candid mood, no studio setup, no text, no watermark.
